title: lithospermum sylvestre
intro: Lithospermum sylvestre, also known as Gromwell or Blue Spiked Speedwell, is a flowering plant native to Europe, Asia, and North Africa. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lithospermum sylvestre include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Lithospermum sylvestre can be prepared as a tincture, decoction, or salve for topical application or ingested as a tea to harness its medicinal properties.
